compiled_state.title: Update cleanup-claude-session.sh for @playwright/cli state management
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Update plugins/dso/scripts/cleanup-claude-session.sh Step 13 to handle @playwright/cli state:
1. Replace .playwright-mcp/ directory cleanup with .playwright-cli/ directory cleanup
2. Update orphaned browser process detection to handle CLI-spawned Chromium processes
3. Add stale session detection (sessions older than configurable threshold)

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/cleanup-claude-session.sh (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script references .playwright-cli/ not .playwright-mcp/
  Verify: grep -q "playwright-cli" plugins/dso/scripts/cleanup-claude-session.sh && ! grep -q "playwright-mcp" plugins/dso/scripts/cleanup-claude-session.sh
- [ ] Orphan process cleanup handles CLI processes
  Verify: grep -qi "playwright.*cli\|chromium.*process\|stale.*session" plugins/dso/scripts/cleanup-claude-session.sh
- [ ] All RED tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-cli-lifecycle-migration.sh 2>&1 | grep -v "FAIL" | grep -q "PASS"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
